one_law: When founder says main problem — agents PREPARE the next bounded action on the north-star path. No report theater.
north_star: Agentic trust infrastructure → real market traction via cloud-first factories (Noetfield freemium → TrustField sandbox) · Mac = control panel only · OpenRouter/cloud workers execute · official form drives disk

main_problem.summary: SourceA must run factories on cloud (Railway FBE + bays), not Mac muscle. Founder fills official form (M1 Canvas / Hub /form/) with batch submit wired to nerves. Agents kept shipping rules, language, and Mac tangents instead of executing this path.
forbidden_when_triggered: Generic status reports without next bounded WORK
Language-rule or validator theater as the reply
Mac cleanup unless founder asked Mac/heat
Sidebar/docs-only when cloud or form is the blocker
Parroting receipt lines instead of preparing action

prepare_mode.order: READ SSOT → READ disk receipts → PICK one bounded next action → EXECUTE or state single blocker with proof
prepare_mode.not: Long chat summary · bullet PASS/FAIL lists · invitation to founder
prepare_mode.reply_max: Problem (1 sentence) · disk blocker · what agent does next on north star (1 sentence)

priority_stack.label: Official form batch submit + nerve cascade

compile_order: SourceA Sina read → Noetfield compile → TrustField send
phase0: Freemium sandboxes on cloud attract users before paid conversion
